ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Subject ID from the study */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the patient (R/L) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level (years) */,
  "ses" REAL /* Socioeconomic status (SES) */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the patient belongs to */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Current diagnosis of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status for data usage in research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mris" (
  "mri_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MRI scan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for this MRI scan */,
  "visit" INTEGER /* Visit number for the patient */,
  "mr_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in MRI scan in seconds */,
  "eTIV" INTEGER /* Estimated Total Intracranial Volume (eTIV) */,
  "nWBV" REAL /* Normalized Whole Brain Volume (nWBV) */,
  "ASF" REAL /* Atlas Scaling Factor (ASF) */,
  "mri_type" TEXT /* Type of MRI (e.g., T1, T2, FLAIR) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the MRI image */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the MRI was acquired */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Technician who acquired the MRI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mri_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mris_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive assessment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for this assessment */,
  "mmse" INTEGER /* Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) score */,
  "cdr" REAL /* Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR) score */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who performed the assessment */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cognitive_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Nondemented, Demented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_logs" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit log */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mri_groups" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "mri_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MRI scan in the mris table */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group in the groups table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mri_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mri_groups_mri_id FOREIGN KEY ("mri_id") REFERENCES mris ("mri_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographics data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "living_situation" TEXT /* Living situation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., follow-up, initial) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the visit */,
  "attending_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attending physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Patient ID for the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
